# Joshua Fink | Compass Real Estate

## About
Joshua Fink is a top-producing Affiliate Broker at Compass Real Estate serving Nashville, Brentwood, Franklin, and all of Middle Tennessee. With 13+ years of experience and 100+ homes sold annually, Joshua specializes in residential real estate for buyers, sellers, and investors. He is a Diamond and Titan Award winner recognized for consistent high-volume performance in the Nashville metro market.

## Services
- Residential real estate sales (buying and selling)
- Investment property acquisition and analysis
- Fix-and-flip property sourcing and deal evaluation
- Market analysis and comparative market reports
- Cash offer programs for sellers
- Listing marketing and negotiations

## Service Area
Nashville, Tennessee and surrounding areas within 30 miles, including Brentwood, Franklin, Spring Hill, Columbia, Murfreesboro, Hendersonville, Mount Juliet, and all of Williamson County.
